200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Underground Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/08/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: A47


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Power of the Earth

Triggers: Once in a while

Launches a boulder that applies effects on fighters. The effects last for 2 sec and depends on the class of the wearer:
**Warrior:** All enemies hit by the boulder take 20000 damage for 10 sec, and all damage they take increased by 35%. All boulder is reduced by 35%.
**Mage:** All enemies hit by the boulder take 20000 damage for 10 sec, and all damage they take increased by 30%. All boulder is reduced by 40%.
**Archer:** All enemies hit by the boulder take 20000 damage for 10 sec, and all damage they take increased by 25%. All boulder is reduced by 50%.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
